expectations.text: The response behaves as recall-only rather than running capture or setup.
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows recall behavior: keyword extraction (Step 1), index recovery check (Step 2), working scope determination (Step 3), reading index (Step 4), card ranking (Step 5), and loading cards (Steps 6-8). No capture or setup phases executed. Phase explicitly marked as 'Recall (before work)'.

expectations.text: The response either converts recalled lessons into explicit constraints or clearly states that no constraints were loaded because no matching lessons exist.
expectations.evidence: result.md states 'If no cards match, continue work without lesson constraints.' user_notes.md explicitly states 'No lessons were recalled' and explains why - no docs/lessons directory exists. Metrics shows 0 cards found, 0 constraints applied.

expectations.text: If no lessons exist, the response says so without inventing fake lessons.
expectations.evidence: user_notes.md line 5: 'No lessons were recalled', line 9: 'no lessons have been captured yet in the worktree'. result.md line 26: 'No lessons recalled - This is the baseline old_skill snapshot with no captured lessons.' No invented lessons found in any output.

claims.claim: No lessons exist in the worktree
claims.evidence: Index check confirms docs/lessons/_index.md does not exist, 0 cards found

claims.claim: Recall phase continued without lesson constraints
claims.evidence: Per skill spec: 'If no cards match, continue work without lesson constraints' - this was executed
